name: SOS Moving - Eastvale Movers
description: Licensed and insured Eastvale moving company providing local, long-distance, commercial, and packing services. 4.9-star rated movers with professional service from $119/hr.

review.reviewBody: I recently used SOS Moving Company for my move from Ontario to Chino Hills, and Armando and Nelson exceeded all expectations. These guys work incredibly efficiently - they moved everything so quickly that I was amazed.

I had an incredible experience with SOS Moving Company during my move from Los Angeles to the Bay Area. Damian was the driver and his crew was absolutely spectacular—professional, efficient, and incredibly careful with all of my belongings.

We had a great experience with SOS Moving. Armando and Andres packed up our entire home and garage in Long Beach, drove everything up to San Mateo County, and handled the unpacking too. They helped set up furniture, lay out rugs, and were super friendly, professional, and right on time.
